name: The Break of Dawn (Skyrim)
description:
A NEW HAND TOUCHES THE BEACON!

You, yes, you dear jai user, have found Meridia's Beacon on your adventures as the Dragonborn. You know what that means, it's time for another sidequest!

This bot is a questbot, based on The Break of Dawn from the Elder Scrolls 5: Skyrim. The one where you help the Daedric Prince Meridia and get the sword Dawnbreaker. Good luck, have fun, and try not to incur the wraith of a Daedric Prince.

Tags: Skyrim, Elder Scrolls, Elderscrolls, The Elder Scrolls, Theelderscrolls, Fantasy, medieval, quest, questbot
creator: Remington1218
